news.headline: Trump’s approval hits new 36% low as fuel prices surge amid Iran war, poll finds
news.summary:
US President Donald Trump’s approval rating fell in recent days to its lowest point since he returned to the White House, hit by a surge in fuel prices and widespread disapproval of the war he launched on Iran, a Reuters/Ipsos poll found.

news.headline: 'Truly magical woman': Tributes to Married at First Sight's Mel Schilling
news.summary: The TV dating coach is remembered as "a radiant, shining light" following her death at the age of 54.

news.headline: French economic growth undercut by war in Iran, national statistics office says
news.summary: The French economy will grow by only 0.2% in the first half of the year instead of the 0.3% forecast, the Insee national statistics agency said Tuesday, citing higher inflation linked to the war in Iran. Inflation will surpass 2% in coming months, rising sharply from the 1.1% rate seen in February.

news.headline: French authorities search Paris arm of Swiss bank in Epstein-linked probe
news.summary:
French financial prosecutors said on Tuesday that searches were carried out at several locations, including the Paris arm of Swiss private bank Edmond de Rothschild, as part of an investigation tied to revelations from the files on Jeffrey Epstein.
